fields.useCase: Real-time claims fraud detection at FNOL (first notice of loss)
fields.execSummary: A hybrid architecture: FNOL events stream from the on-prem claims core into Azure, where a fraud-scoring service returns a risk band and rationale to the adjuster workbench in under 2 seconds. Humans decide; the system recommends and documents.
fields.overallArch: Event-driven: ClaimCenter -> Event Hub -> scoring service (AKS) -> workbench plugin. Batch path retained for retro-scoring and model evaluation.
fields.dataArch: Feature store on Synapse; PII minimized at ingestion; Purview lineage from source to score. 3 years of labelled SIU outcomes as training base.
fields.aiMlArch: Gradient-boosted baseline + LLM narrative-analysis feature (Azure OpenAI, in-tenant); champion/challenger deployment; drift monitoring with monthly review.
fields.integrationArch: REST callback into ClaimCenter activity queue; SIU case system receives auto-referrals above threshold with full score rationale attached.
fields.techSelections: Azure OpenAI (in-tenant), Azure ML, Event Hub, AKS, Azure AI Search for narrative retrieval, Purview for governance.
